Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/CoBFTzzwHyvV2PIacD2qAnuiE0.svg); confirmed by directly rendering the asset in a browser (full row: LLaMA-2=85.0, PaLM-2-Large=86.1, Inflection-1=85.0[consistent with the existing Inflection-1 entry's noted 'up to 85.0 on the Wikipedia split, 1-shot'], Inflection-2=87.2). This supersedes an earlier research pass's attempted TriviaQA figure of 86.3 for Inflection-2, which this corpus correctly dropped as unverifiable chart-only data -- 87.2 is the actual, now-confirmed value.
